commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And in the latter time of their kingdom, when the transgressors have come to their fullness, a king of bold countenance, and understanding riddles, shall stand up. Hebrew: "hard "cruel, and impudent, as Epiphanes was, 1 Machabees i. Marcellinus styles him "wrathful and savage. " Sentences, making use of artifice to seize the estates of his nephew Philometor, and to oppress the Jews, 2 Machabees v. (Calmet) The history speaks of Antiochus: antichrist is also meant, as chap. and Matthew xxiv. (Worthington).
